description_long: This is a life-sized adult male figure dressed in casual urban attire, featuring a hooded sweatshirt with a subtle gradient pattern and drawstrings at the neck. The figure wears fitted jogger-style pants and low-profile sneakers, giving a relaxed yet modern appearance suitable for city environments. The face is clean-shaven with short, neatly styled hair, and the hands are extended horizontally in a T-pose. The clothing appears to be made of soft, flexible fabric, and the shoes have a simple, athletic design. The overall build is average, with realistic human proportions and no visible accessories or carried items. The figure's posture is upright and neutral, suggesting readiness for animation or placement in a digital urban scene.
description: A casually dressed adult male in a hooded sweatshirt, jogger pants, and sneakers, standing upright with arms extended. The figure has short hair and a modern, relaxed urban style.
description_view_0: Front view shows the face, chest, and full details of the hooded sweatshirt and jogger pants, with arms extended horizontally.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the face, the side seam of the clothing, and the silhouette of the sneakers.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the hooded sweatshirt, the hood itself, and the back of the pants and shoes.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the profile of the head, side of the clothing, and the extended arm.
attribute_clothing_type: casual hooded sweatshirt and jogger pants with athletic sneakers
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended horizontally
